response: Imagine you’ve got a damaged blue UK electrical plug with a slightly curved prong. You’re trying to plug it into one of three different wall sockets: one with round pins, another with straight flat pins, or the third with the standard three-pin layout. Which socket will it fit into?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a bent blue UK plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
